creator: bordjukov@gmail.com
text:
The current configuration of the kernel for the UBNT Routerstation does not allow proper GPIO control.

Fix: Copy over to ROUTERSTATION.hints the portion of RSPRO.hints that remedies this issue.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: # echo 1 > /dev/led/rf

or

# gpioctl -f /dev/gpioc0 -l
